name: tutti
description: Tutti workspace app authoring, conversion, and agent app architecture tools.

interface.shortDescription: Create Tutti workspace and agent apps
interface.longDescription: Skills for generating, converting, validating, localizing, and repairing self-contained Tutti workspace app packages, CLI-callable app surfaces, and agent-enabled app repositories.
defaultPrompt: Create a Tutti workspace app package.
Convert this repository into a Tutti workspace app package.
Create an agent-enabled Tutti workspace app repository.
Add a Tutti CLI surface to a workspace app package.
Repair this Tutti workspace app package.
Validate a Tutti workspace app manifest.
